title: Screaming Circle: Breathwork for Sacred Rage & Grief
description: Screaming Circle: Breathwork for Sacred Rage Breathwork is not about escapism. It's not about spiritual bypassing. It's about building capacity and resilience to rise to the occasion... to meet the intensity of times with more clarity and choice. It's saying: don't ignore it, channel it.

title: Inner Child Art Nyte
description: 🎨 A joy-filled evening of creativity and play. Feeling a little disconnected? Craving a little creative play time? Just wanna let loose for a bit? You're in the right place.

title: Viewcy | Full Moon Cacao Ceremony & Sound Journey
description: Step into an intimate evening of connection, intention, and deep inner exploration under **April’s Pink Full Moon in Libra**. This Cacao Ceremony & Sound Journey** **is a space to **open the heart, re...

title: The Art and Science of Conscious Co-Founder and Collaborator Conversations
description: Many of the most iconic companies in the world started with a powerful cofounder relationship. Finding a person who you can share the burden of building a remarkable company with can be transformational - it’s not just splitting up the work and finding someone with complimentary talents, it’s connec…

title: Experimental Ambisonic Sound Bath
description: Experimental Ambisonic Sound Bath with Marika Koguchi & MAYSUN Marika Koguchi and MAYSUN present an immersive, multi-dimensional meditative sound experience. Together, they combine acoustic instruments and digital processing within Reforesters’ unique ambisonic space.

title: Return Home to Yourself: An Embodied Breath Initiation
description: This is an initiation—an experience that stays with you long after you leave the room. It is an invitation into the juiciest experience of play, curiosity, and self-expression—where the body remembers that anything is possible.

title: Aries Season Breathwork Gathering
description: Aries Season Breathwork Gathering Join us for an afternoon of breath & community to connect with the rebirth energy of Aries Season. The vibes are: fiery, creative, bright, renewal, rebirth, taking action, bold, playful. ☆ PART 1: COSMIC WEATHER FORECAST We’ll open our circle by sharing intentions.

title: Laughter Yoga
description: Laughter Yoga You're invited to Laughter Yoga at Reforesters in Williamsburg. Laughter Yoga was created by Indian physician Dr. Madan Kataria after studying the many benefits that laughter has on the body, mind, and spirit.

title: Ego Free Jam - Acoustic
description: A night of improvisational sound and music for musicians and non-musicians alike, in a beautiful and cozy space. Bring your own instruments or use the venue’s. Play, move your body, or just tune into others during two journeys, each lasting about two hours. No spectators. Shoes off.

title: Viewcy | BOUNCE @ Lightning Lofts
description: When was the last time you truly celebrated Easter? Somewhere along the way, Easter quietly became a holiday adults stopped celebrating.This year, we’re giving Easter the glow up it deserves ✨On Satur...

title: Collaborative Songwriting Circle
description: Songwriters of all experience levels are invited to Collaborative Songwriting Night! There will be opportunities to: • play songwriting games • write individually • write in pairs • write as a group • give and receive feedback on songs in progress • connect and build community with kind, open-minded…

title: Dreaming New Myths (Rites) of Spring
description: Dreaming New Myths (Rites) of Spring: Evening of Sound and Story Tonight, we'll come together to meditate and dream up new myths of springtime, rebirth, seasonality, and sensuality.

title: Member Monday Sisterhood Connection Session: Planting seeds of abundance | 4/6
description: ​​ Hey sister, how are you? I mean, how are you, really? ​​​Do you have a desire to feel more grounded, inspired, and connected? ​​​Do you ever tire of surface-level conversations and long for more meaningful, heart-felt connection? ​​​Then our bi-weekly sisterhood calls are for you.

title: Candlelight CircleSing
description: These sessions are the heart of what we've been building here at Gaia - warm, welcoming spaces for spontaneous singing and harmonizing, led with joy, passion, and kindness by skilled circlesong facilitators.

title: Sound & Stillness: A Guided Meditation
description: Sound & Stillness: A Guided Meditation Take a pause in your day to settle, reconnect, and sit in community. If you’ve been wanting support for your practice, this is a wonderful place to start!

title: Tantric Latihan: Open Practice
description: Tantric Latihan: Open Practice is for folks who are already versed in the somatic language of this practice and would like to deepen their connection to their somatic body. Your practice will begin when you step into the container.

title: After-hours Immersion: Women’s Voices in Art | 4/10 (NYC)
description: ​Join us on Friday April 10th for an exclusive after-hours reception at the Everywoman Biennial , featuring a private guided walk-through of this stunning exhibit.

title: Yoga Club - Cozy Yin + Tea 🫖 (Williamsburg)
description: Yoga Club - Cozy Yin + Tea 🫖 Important note: Come find us in the cafe at 10:30 AM for tea and good company. We will walk into the studio together at 11:00 AM. The space has us starting right at 11:00 and we don't want you missing any of it.

title: MAGIC BODY
description: YOU HAVE THE MAGIC WITHIN YOU “I wish I could show you, when you are lonely or in darkness, the astonishing light of your own being.” — Hafiz of Shiraz What to Expect We begin by arriving as a collective—checking in with our bodies, our breath, and the energetic stories we’re holding.

title: Seeding Songs of Resistance
description: *** Meet at 1:15 at meet in the lobby of the Brooklyn Central Library! In times of great change, in moments of collective grief or courage, music can be a lifeline — a way to connect, to center, to uplift, to resist, and to sing ourselves towards justice.

title: Singles Improv Game Night
description: Singles Improv Game Night Where laughter leads to connection. Let's be honest — dating is hard. But what if connection started with a laugh instead of just a profile? Single Saturdays and Laila - the first, first date app - are teaming up to bring you a night of connection through laughter!

title: Viewcy | Attunement -- Somatic Explorations of the Field Between
description: **A 3.5 hour Somatic Exploration of the Field Between** This is an age of alienation. We dream of being seen and embraced in our entirety. We thrill at the jolt of erotic charge as it moves through th...

title: Eros Battle Magick: Daytime Play Gathering (April 2026)
description: Let’s play in the day. Eros Battle Magick to fight the power. First of it’s kind
location: Near Union Square (exact address upon registration)

title: Somartica
description: Somartica: Where movement meets creativity & Presence meets play What happens when adults remember their most embodied, creative selves? Join us for an evening where meditation melts into movement, movement makes way to art, and before you know it, you're drawing on the walls, rolling on the ground…

title: CircleSing
description: These sessions are the heart of what we've been building here at Gaia - warm, welcoming spaces for spontaneous singing and harmonizing, led with joy, passion, and kindness by skilled circlesong facilitators. WHAT IS CIRCLESINGING?

title: Global Song Exchange
description: LET'S SING SONGS FROM AROUND THE WORLD! Our Global Song Exchange is an opportunity to sing music from around the world as we learn more about the rich musical tapestry of our community!

title: "The Story" - Brandi Carlile | One-Day Choir
description: WHAT IS A ONE-DAY CHOIR? Gaia Music Collective's One-Day Choir series is an opportunity to sing in a choir for one day only. A celebration of song and the connective power of singing in harmony. An opportunity to build community, make some new friends, and raise our powerfully diverse voices as one.

title: Viewcy | Full Circle ft. Reboot at GreenPoint Loft
description: Dance with us & Reboot NYC at Greenpoint Loft April 15th! 6:30 Doors Open7:00 - 8:00 Opening Yoga with Anna Lesniak (Daya Yoga)8:00 -10:30 Ecstatic Dance with Edwin & Fatin (Reboot NYC) 10:30 -11:00 ...
